variables.queries: artificial intelligence news,machine learning trends,deep learning 2026

actions.script: async function fetchSearchHTML(t,e,n){const s=new URLSearchParams({q:t,cc:e,qft:n}),r=await fetch("https://www.bing.com/news/search?"+s.toString());return await r.text()}function extractTitle(t){const e=t.match(/<title>(.*?)<\/title>/i);return e?e[1].trim():""}function GetResultCount(t,e=""){const n=[".sb_count","#b_tween .sb_count",".b_pag .sb_count","#b_results .sb_count","span.sb_count"];for(const e of n){const n=t.querySelector(e);if(n){const t=n.textContent.replace(/[^\d]/g,"");if(t)return parseInt(t,10)}}if(e){const t=[/class="sb_count"[^>]*>([^<]+)</i,/>(\d[\d,\.]*?)\s+results?</i,/About\s+([\d,\.]+)\s+results?/i,/([\d,]+)\s+results?/i];for(const n of t){const t=n.exec(e);if(t&&t[1]){const e=t[1].replace(/[^\d]/g,"");if(e)return parseInt(e,10)}}}return null}function extractBingNews(t=document){const e=t.querySelectorAll(".news-card.newsitem"),n=[];return e.forEach(((t,e)=>{const s={};s.position=e+1;const r=t.querySelector("a.title");s.link=r?.href||"N/A",s.title=r?.textContent.trim()||"N/A";const c=t.querySelector(".snippet");s.snippet=c?.textContent.trim()||"N/A";const o=t.querySelector(".pubimg");s.source=o?.title?.trim()||"N/A";const i=t.getAttribute("url")||t.getAttribute("data-url");try{s.domain=new URL(i).hostname}catch(e){s.domain="N/A"}const a=t.querySelector('.caption .source span[tabindex="0"]')?.textContent.trim()||"N/A";s.time=a;const u=new Date;if(a.endsWith("h")){const t=parseInt(a);s.dateUTC=new Date(u.getTime()-60*t*60*1e3).toISOString()}else if(a.endsWith("m")){const t=parseInt(a);s.dateUTC=new Date(u.getTime()-60*t*1e3).toISOString()}else s.dateUTC="N/A";n.push(s)})),n}async function processQuery(t,e,n){try{const s="https://www.bing.com/news/search?"+new URLSearchParams({q:t,cc:e,qft:n}).toString(),r=await fetch(s),c=await r.text(),o=(new DOMParser).parseFromString(c,"text/html"),i=extractTitle(c),a=GetResultCount(o,c);return{success:!0,query:t,title:i,news_results:extractBingNews(o),result_count:a}}catch(e){return{success:!1,query:t,error:e.message}}}async function fetchSearches(t,e,n){return await Promise.all(t.map((t=>processQuery(t,e,n))))} var queryList='${queries}'.split(',').map(function(q){return q.trim()}).filter(function(q){return q.length>0}); var results=await fetchSearches(queryList,'${cc}','${qft}'); return JSON.stringify(results);
